name: mcp
description: Bridge external MCP servers (stdio, HTTP, SSE) into the assistant's toolset.

configSchema.label: MCP servers
configSchema.help: External MCP servers to connect and expose as tools. Choose a transport per server: stdio launches a local process (e.g. npx …); HTTP or SSE connect to a remote URL. stdio servers run in their own process group and are killed as a group on reload, so npx child processes are never orphaned.

configSchema.label: Timeouts
configSchema.hint: Global connect and call timeouts, applied to every configured server.

configSchema.label: Connect timeout (ms)
configSchema.hint: How long to wait for a server to connect and list its tools before giving up.

configSchema.label: Tool call timeout (ms)
configSchema.hint: How long to wait for a bridged tool call to finish before giving up.
